about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: The story of Dirgham CNC Woodworks
about.storyText: Dirgham CNC Woodworks is a specialized workshop in designing and executing woodwork using the latest computer-controlled cutting and engraving technology. We combine traditional craftsmanship with modern technology to deliver unique products that meet the highest quality standards.
about.visionText: To be the first choice in CNC woodwork in the region, known for our creativity, quality, and exceptional customer service.
about.missionText: To provide innovative and precise wood solutions that combine beauty and functionality, while maintaining the highest standards of quality and professionalism.
about.experienceText: Over 10 years of experience in CNC and carpentry, with a professional team of designers and technicians.
